shared_properties: Projectile frames use 160x160 px cells with centered motion arcs and transparent outer padding.
Each element row keeps the same flight axis so timing judgement stays deterministic.
differences: This sheet contains 8 element rows and 14 columns per row, covering Fly, Reflect, and Hit clips for Fire, Water, Thunder, Wind, Ice, Poison, Light, and Dark projectiles.

reference_images.label: Reflect Academy GDD
reference_images.purpose: Element color set, damage role, projectile size class, and state counts grounding.

reference_images.label: Reflect Academy moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Glow intensity, corridor depth, and projectile visibility grounding.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: Use one TextureAtlasLayout keyed by element and state clip tables inside a ProjectileVisualMap resource.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load obstacles/elemental_projectile_state_sheet.png through AssetServer and build a row-index lookup for all eight elements.
runtime_notes: The atlas uses 8 rows and 14 columns with one 160x160 cell per frame.
Columns 0-5 are Fly, columns 6-9 are Reflect, and columns 10-13 are Hit.
Rows map top to bottom as Fire, Water, Thunder, Wind, Ice, Poison, Light, Dark.

context.role: Primary projectile hazard atlas for all elemental attacks and reflected returns.
context.usage: Spawned during every attack exchange and swapped to reflect or hit clips according to timing results.

deliverables.notes: Eight element rows with fourteen 160x160 frames per row.
Element row map and Fly/Reflect/Hit clip metadata.

acceptance_criteria: Sheet size is exactly 2240x1280 px with 8 rows and 14 columns of 160x160 cells.
Rows map top to bottom as Fire, Water, Thunder, Wind, Ice, Poison, Light, and Dark with the listed hex values present in specs.colors_hex.
Each row contains 6 Fly frames, 4 Reflect frames, and 4 Hit frames with no unused nontransparent pixels outside the 160x160 cell bounds.
